title: Provider Runner Beta (#538) — Freshness/Budget/Approval Gates + Run Ledger

learning_candidates.summary: Gate-first pipeline pattern: 6 gates before provider execution — manifest → freshness → budget → approval → circuit_breaker → apply_live_call → executor
learning_candidates.evidence: Validated across all 6 pipeline gates (specifier through ops), PR #547 merged

learning_candidates.summary: Provider runner is Node CLI/runner, NOT Cloudflare Worker — confirmed by all gates
learning_candidates.evidence: PLAN, CODE REVIEW (11/11), QA (7/7), OPS all validated this architectural decision
learning_candidates.recommended_action: store as durable infrastructure fact for Growth OS

learning_candidates.summary: ProviderRunLedgerRow TS type missing locale/market/entity_key/action_key columns from DB migration
learning_candidates.recommended_action: align TS type with DB schema for production readiness (#539/#540)

learning_candidates.summary: Circuit breaker lacks UI for manual reset
learning_candidates.evidence: Documented in plan but not implemented in #538

learning_candidates.summary: cost_requires_owner_issue field unused in gate logic
Registry hardening: migrate manifest.ts → dynamic .mjs registry import
learning_candidates.evidence: Static subset used for beta due to Jest ESM friction
learning_candidates.recommended_action: resolve ESM friction and restore dynamic import

title: PT-BR Blog Routing + Hreflang Completeness Fix

learning_candidates.summary: Three-layer locale fix: (1) URL segment recognition in middleware, (2) data-access locale normalization at DB boundary, (3) SEO metadata/hreflang emission — all three must align for a new locale to render in production
learning_candidates.evidence: Fix committed at d8310671, 6 files changed, 688 additions, all 3 post-deploy verifier blockages addressed

learning_candidates.summary: normalizeBlogPublicLocale() in middleware.ts hardcoded pt -> pt-PT which was the silent root cause of PT-BR blog 404s; now consolidated to shared normalizeBlogLocale() mapping pt -> pt-BR
learning_candidates.evidence: Confirmed by 3 separate verifiers blocked on same root cause (México run 1140/897, Panamá run 1141/900, Villa de Leyva run 1139)
learning_candidates.recommended_action: store as durable locale mapping fact

learning_candidates.summary: website.supported_locales must contain exact BCP-47 locale codes the frontend routes to (pt-BR), not family/superset codes (pt-PT). Middleware routing directly consults this column.
learning_candidates.evidence: ColombiaTours supported_locales=[es,es-CO,en-US,pt-PT,fr-FR,de-DE] caused middleware to reject pt-BR blog requests at routing time
learning_candidates.recommended_action: store as durable DB config fact

learning_candidates.summary: New locale checklist: update (1) PUBLIC_LOCALE_SEGMENT_BY_LOCALE, (2) PUBLIC_LOCALE_ALIAS_BY_SEGMENT, (3) getBlogLocaleLookupCandidates(), (4) website.supported_locales in DB. Missing any one produces production 404s.
learning_candidates.evidence: PR #549 fix required all 4, verified across 3 post-deploy verifier tasks
learning_candidates.recommended_action: write cross-team process doc for transcreation frontend handoff

learning_candidates.summary: ADR-019 needs amendment for BCP-47 blog path prefix exception (pt-br is only hyphenated segment; all other locales use two-letter codes)
learning_candidates.evidence: Noted in SPEC_PTBR_BLOG_ROUTING_HREFLANG.md as narrow amendment; requires documentation follow-up after PR #549 merge
learning_candidates.recommended_action: open issue for ADR-019 amendment after PR merge

learning_candidates.summary: hrefLang (capital L) bug in template components makes hreflang emission incomplete for Google/Lighthouse parsers
learning_candidates.evidence: Villa de Leyva verifier run 1139 flagged this as separate pre-existing bug, not fixed in this pipeline
learning_candidates.recommended_action: open issue to fix hrefLang->hreflang casing in blog template components

learning_candidates.summary: website.supported_locales should validate at write time or have reconciliation for stale pt-PT value in ColombiaTours
learning_candidates.evidence: Verifier run 1140 traced 404 root cause to supported_locales mismatch (pt-PT vs pt-BR)
learning_candidates.recommended_action: open data integrity issue for supported_locales validation

learning_candidates.summary: Pre-deploy smoke test should include locale routing check before production promotion
learning_candidates.evidence: Post-deploy verifiers caught locale 404s that pre-deploy routing smoke test would have caught earlier
learning_candidates.recommended_action: add locale routing smoke test to CI/CD pipeline

learning_candidates.summary: getBlogPostByTranslationGroup() fix: use .in("locale", localeCandidates) instead of exact .eq("locale", locale) — this pattern should be standard for all locale-based blog queries
learning_candidates.evidence: Part of the fix at get-website.ts, resolved missing translation-group lookups for legacy short-code rows
